mano_cua.result_summary: 空optgroup导致Select all复选框状态bug：点击全选后6个选项全部勾选、显示'All selected'正确，但[Select all]复选框自身保持未勾选状态。对比无空optgroup的下拉框，Select all复选框正确变为勾选状态。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Empty optgroup causes [Select all] checkbox to remain unchecked after selecting all options, while a normal optgroup select correctly shows [Select all] as checked. The empty optgroup affects the select-all state calculation logic.
